# Style Reference Guide

<!-- Generated by design-style-agent -->
<!-- Feature: Contact Form & Admin Submissions Panel -->
<!-- Theme: Dark-only (NFR5) — professional, modern, neutral dark palette with slate-blue accent -->

---

## Typography

- **Page title (h1):** Use for the main page heading on each screen (e.g., "Inbox", the contact form header). `text-2xl font-bold` on desktop; `text-xl font-bold` on mobile. Use `<h1>` semantically — one per page.
- **Section headings (h2):** Use for card group headings or form section labels if grouping is needed. `text-lg font-semibold`.
- **Card titles / prominent names:** The submitter's Name in the admin inbox card should be the most visually prominent element. Use `text-base font-semibold text-foreground`.
- **Body text:** `text-sm text-foreground` for most content. Submission message body in detail view: `text-sm leading-relaxed`.
- **Metadata / secondary info:** Email, date/time, subject labels in cards. Use `text-xs text-muted-foreground`. Date format: "March 4 at 7:02 AM" (R11).
- **Error messages:** Inline field errors use `text-xs text-destructive`. The top error banner (R5) uses `text-sm font-medium`.
- **Success state heading:** "Message Sent!" — `text-xl font-bold text-foreground` (R4).
- **Success state subtitle:** "Thanks for reaching out…" — `text-sm text-muted-foreground` (R4).
- **Character counter:** `text-xs text-muted-foreground` below textarea. Changes to `text-destructive` when at or near limit (R3).
- **Font family:** Use `font-sans` (Geist Sans via the `@theme` bridge). No custom font stack needed.

---

## Spacing

- **Page padding:** `px-4 py-6` on mobile; `px-6 py-8` on tablet+. Center content with `max-w-lg mx-auto` for the contact form; `max-w-3xl mx-auto` for the admin inbox.
- **Form field spacing:** `space-y-4` between form fields. Label sits directly above the input with no extra gap.
- **Card padding:** `p-4` inside submission cards in the inbox list. `p-6` in the submission detail view.
- **Card gap (list):** `space-y-3` between submission cards in the inbox.
- **Section gap:** `mt-8` before the privacy policy link below the contact form.
- **Button margin:** `mt-6` above the submit button or primary action.
- **Success state:** Center the success icon, heading, and subtitle vertically with `flex flex-col items-center gap-4 py-12`.
- **Error banner (R5):** `mb-4` below the banner before the first form field. Use `p-3` inner padding on the banner.

---

## Component Selection

- **Contact form container:** Use `<Card>` (`<CardContent>` with `pt-6`) to lift the form off the page background. Do not use bare `<div>` — the card surface provides the visual elevation.
- **Form inputs:** Use Shadcn `<Input>` for name and email. Use Shadcn `<Textarea>` for message. Use Shadcn `<Select>` (`<SelectTrigger>`, `<SelectContent>`, `<SelectItem>`) for the Subject dropdown (R1, R2).
- **Submit button:** Shadcn `<Button>` (default variant — filled primary).
- **"Send another message" button (R4):** Shadcn `<Button variant="outline">` — ghost/outline style as specified.
- **Error banner (R5):** Use a `<div>` with `bg-destructive/15 border border-destructive text-destructive` classes. Do NOT use a Dialog or Toast — it must appear inline above the fields.
- **Inline validation errors (BR1–BR5):** Plain `<p>` with `text-destructive text-xs` below the relevant input. No separate component needed.
- **Character counter (R3):** Plain `<p>` or `<span>` with `text-muted-foreground text-xs text-right` below the textarea. No separate component.
- **Success state (R4):** Render inline in the form area (no navigation). Use a centered `<div>` with `<CheckCircle>` icon from `lucide-react` (green — `text-green-500`), heading, subtitle, and outline button.
- **Admin submission cards (R11):** Use Shadcn `<Card>` with `cursor-pointer hover:bg-accent/50 transition-colors`. The card is the clickable unit — wrap in a Next.js `<Link>` or use `router.push`.
- **Admin detail view:** Use `<Card>` with a `<CardHeader>` for the submission name/date and `<CardContent>` for the full message and metadata fields.
- **Login form:** Use `<Card>` centering with Shadcn `<Input>` fields and `<Button>`. Keep it minimal — only username and password.
- **Logout control (R8):** Use Shadcn `<Button variant="ghost" size="sm">` placed in the top-right area of admin pages (consistent position on all admin pages).
- **Privacy policy link (CR1):** Use a plain `<a>` or Next.js `<Link>` with `text-primary underline-offset-4 hover:underline` below the submit button.

---

## Layout

- **Contact form page:** Single-column centered layout. Max width `max-w-lg`. Form is the only content above the fold. Privacy policy link appears below the form card (CR1).
- **Admin login page:** Centered card, `max-w-sm`. Vertically centered on the viewport (`min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center`).
- **Admin inbox (submissions list):** Single-column, `max-w-3xl mx-auto`. "Inbox" heading (`h1`) + current year subtitle at top, then the card list below. No sidebar in this feature.
- **Admin detail page:** Single-column, `max-w-2xl mx-auto`. Back navigation link at the top. One card with all submission fields.
- **Responsive:** All layouts stack to `px-4` on mobile. No horizontal scroll. Submission cards should not truncate name/subject on small screens — they reflow naturally.
- **Logout control position:** Fixed to the top-right of the page on all admin pages. Use a simple `flex justify-between items-center` header row with the page title and logout button.
- **No sidebar or navigation drawer** — this feature is small enough that direct page navigation is sufficient.

---

## Motion & Animation

- **Card hover transition:** `transition-colors duration-150` on submission cards. Subtle — just the background color shift on hover.
- **Form submission loading:** Show a loading spinner inside the submit button while the API call is in flight. Use Shadcn's `<Button disabled>` with a `<Loader2 className="animate-spin" />` icon from `lucide-react`. Do not disable other form fields.
- **Success state transition:** No animation required — the form simply replaces with the success state. A fade-in (`opacity-0 animate-in fade-in duration-300`) can be used if desired but is not required.
- **Error banner:** Appear immediately on API failure — no animation needed.
- **Reduced motion:** The globals.css already includes `@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)` which disables animations globally. No additional handling needed.

---

## Accessibility

- **Contrast:** All text/background combinations in `.dark` theme meet WCAG AA (4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text):
  - `--foreground` (`oklch(0.97 0 0)`) on `--background` (`oklch(0.13 0 0)`): ~15:1 ✓
  - `--muted-foreground` (`oklch(0.65 0 0)`) on `--card` (`oklch(0.19 0 0)`): ~5.5:1 ✓
  - `--destructive` (`oklch(0.63 0.22 25)`) on `--background`: ~4.6:1 ✓
- **Focus rings:** `--ring` is set to the primary slate-blue. Shadcn components use `outline-ring/50` by default (via `@layer base`). Ensure custom components use `focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring`.
- **Form labels:** Every input must have a corresponding `<label>` associated via `htmlFor`. Do not use placeholder text as the only label.
- **Required fields:** Mark all four form fields as `required` in HTML and use `aria-required="true"`. Do not use asterisks as the sole indicator of required status — supplement with text or a legend.
- **Error association:** Inline validation error messages must be associated with their input using `aria-describedby`. Screen readers must announce validation errors without visual inspection.
- **Success state (R4):** The success state replacing the form must be announced to screen readers. Use `role="alert"` or `aria-live="polite"` on the success container so it is announced when it appears.
- **Error banner (R5):** Use `role="alert"` on the error banner div so screen readers announce it immediately when it appears.
- **Keyboard navigation:** All interactive elements (inputs, buttons, select, cards, links) must be reachable and operable via Tab key. Submission cards must be focusable (use `<Link>` which is inherently focusable).
- **Icon-only buttons:** If the logout control is ever icon-only, add `aria-label="Log out"`. Prefer text labels.

---

## Brand Tone

- **Voice:** Professional and friendly. Clean and direct. This is a contact form for a simple admin tool — not a marketing product.
- **Error messages:** Clear, helpful, non-blaming. "Please enter a valid email address." not "Invalid email!". "Name is required." not "You forgot to enter a name."
- **Success message (R4):** Warm and reassuring. "Message Sent!" with "Thanks for reaching out. I'll get back to you soon." — already specified in FRS, use verbatim.
- **Error banner (R5):** Calm and actionable. "Something went wrong. Please try again or contact us directly." — verbatim from FRS.
- **Empty state (admin inbox, no submissions yet):** If the inbox has no submissions, show a brief, friendly empty state: "No submissions yet." with a muted-foreground colour. No elaborate illustration needed.
- **Button labels:** "Submit", "Send another message", "Log in", "Log out", "Back to inbox". Use sentence case. Avoid ALL CAPS.
- **Privacy policy link text (CR1):** "Privacy Policy" — linked naturally in context, e.g., "By submitting this form, you agree to our [Privacy Policy]." or "Read our [Privacy Policy]." Keep it understated.
- **Placeholder text in privacy policy (CR2):** Must include a visible notice that the content is not yet complete: "This privacy policy is a placeholder and is not yet complete. Please check back before using this application in production."
